closureNotes.overrideRecord: Three substrate-confirmed overrides vs anchored spec, per memory #15 documented-override-not-compliance discipline. (1) lint-staged-forced ESLint cleanup — the anchored spec's diff-vs-baseline-no-cleanup posture was impossible because lint-staged blocks staging main.ts while the 6 pre-existing no-empty-function errors exist; cleanup of those patterns was forced into scope. (2) TS2742 annotation pair — T5-introduced TS2742 on routes/uro/index.ts + voxel-groups.route.ts blocked tsc green; ReturnType<typeof Router> annotations (matching viewer-token.route.ts pattern) were required beyond spec prose. (3) 5-vs-6 count drift — apply.sh count-guard expected exactly 6 `.catch(() => {})` patterns per the eslint baseline report; EB-CLI grep found 5; count-guard corrected in-place by CLI, documented in commit. Minor substrate-count drift, no functional impact, net result lint-staged green.
